title: Parallel Web Systems hits $2B valuation five months after its last big raise
summary: AI agent-tool startup Parallel Web Systems, founded by former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal, raised $100 million from Sequoia, hitting a $2 billion valuation just months after its previous $100 million raise. The rapid scaling reflects strong investor confidence in AI agent technology.
content: The AI agent-tool startup founded by former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal has raised $100 million, led by Sequoia, months after raising a previous $100 million.

zh.title: Parallel Web Systems在最后一次大融资五个月后达到20亿美元估值
zh.summary: AI代理工具初创公司Parallel Web Systems由前Twitter首席执行官Parag Agrawal创办，从Sequoia融资1亿美元，仅在前一次1亿美元融资数个月后就达到20亿美元估值。快速扩展反映了投资者对AI代理技术的强烈信心。

title: All the evidence unveiled so far in Musk v. Altman
summary: The Musk v. Altman trial is revealing evidence from OpenAI's early days, showing Nvidia donated a supercomputer, Musk heavily influenced the company's mission and structure, and key executives had concerns about his involvement. The exhibits expose the complex power dynamics and corporate history behind OpenAI's founding.
content:
The Musk v. Altman trial is underway, and that means exhibits, or the evidence to be presented in court, are being revealed piece by piece. So far, email exchanges, photos, and corporate documents are circulating from the earliest days of OpenAI - and from before the AI lab even had a name. Some high-level takeaways: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang gave OpenAI an in-demand supercomputer, Musk largely drafted OpenAI's mission and heavily influenced its early structure, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman appeared to want to lean heavily on Y Combinator for early support for OpenAI, OpenAI president Greg Brockman and Ilya Sutskever worried about Musk's level of con …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Musk诉Altman案中迄今披露的所有证据
zh.summary: Musk诉Altman案审判披露了OpenAI早期的证据，显示英伟达捐赠了超级计算机、Musk对公司使命和结构产生重大影响，且关键高管对他的参与表示担忧。这些呈堂证物揭露了OpenAI创立背后的复杂权力动态和企业历史。

title: Howdy's dated $3/month ad-free streaming service said to have 1M subscribers
summary: Howdy's $3-per-month ad-free streaming service has reached 1 million subscribers with strong retention rates. The budget offering demonstrates sustained consumer demand for bare-bones streaming alternatives.
content: Most are keeping their subscriptions after signing up, too, research firm says.

zh.title: Howdy月费3美元无广告流媒体服务据称拥有100万订户
zh.summary: Howdy月费3美元无广告流媒体服务已达到100万订户，用户留存率强劲。这一低价产品体现了消费者对极简流媒体替代品的持续需求。

title: New Sam Bankman-Fried trial would be huge waste of court’s time, judge says
summary: A judge rejected Sam Bankman-Fried's request for a new trial, calling it a waste of court's time. SBF had claimed political persecution by Biden's DOJ after recently coming out as a Republican.
content: FTX fraudster came out as Republican, then tried to claim Biden's DOJ targeted him.

zh.title: 法官称新山姆·班克曼-弗里德审判会浪费大量法庭时间
zh.summary: 一位法官驳回了山姆·班克曼-弗里德的新审判请求，认为这会浪费法庭时间。SBF最近宣布自己是共和党人后，声称遭到拜登司法部的政治迫害。

title: Ubuntu’s AI plans have Linux users looking for a ‘kill switch’
summary: Canonical's plan to integrate AI features into Ubuntu has sparked user backlash, with requests for an "AI kill switch" and comparisons to Microsoft's controversial Windows 11 AI additions. The company has stated it won't provide a global option to disable the features.
content:
Canonical's plan to add AI features to Ubuntu has some users asking for "a version of Ubuntu that does not include these features," while others say they'll stick with older versions of the Linux distro or even switch to a different one. After Canonical's announcement earlier this week that it's bringing AI features to Ubuntu, replies included requests for an AI "kill switch" or a way to disable the upcoming features, and comparisons to Microsoft's addition of AI features into Windows 11. Canonical's VP of engineering, Jon Seager, responded on Tuesday, stating that Canonical isn't planning to add a "global AI kill switch," but users will be  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Ubuntu的AI计划让Linux用户寻找"关闭开关"
zh.summary: Canonical计划将AI功能集成到Ubuntu中，引发用户强烈反弹，用户要求提供"AI关闭开关"，并将此与微软备受争议的Windows 11 AI功能进行对比。该公司表示不会提供禁用这些功能的全局选项。

title: Drone strikes on data centers spook Big Tech, halting Middle East projects
summary: Drone strikes on Middle East data centers have raised insurance concerns and prompted major tech companies to halt or reconsider their regional infrastructure projects. War damage risks are forcing a strategic rethink of expansion plans in the region.
content: Uninsurable war damage is forcing tech companies to rethink Middle East plans.

zh.title: 无人机空袭数据中心令科技巨头担忧，中东项目被迫暂停
zh.summary: 中东数据中心遭无人机空袭引发保险担忧，促使主要科技公司暂停或重新考虑其地区基础设施项目。战争损害风险正在促使公司战略性地重新评估该地区的扩展计划。

title: Motorola reveals 2026 Razr lineup with modest upgrades and higher prices
summary: Motorola's 2026 Razr foldable lineup introduces modest hardware improvements alongside significant price increases. The updates reflect broader market trends driven by memory shortages pushing component costs higher.
content: Motorola's foldable lineup is bigger and more spendy than ever.

zh.title: 摩托罗拉推出2026年Razr系列 性能小幅升级但价格上升
zh.summary: 摩托罗拉2026年Razr可折叠系列推出适度的硬件改进,同时大幅提价。这些升级反映了由于内存短缺推高零部件成本而产生的更广泛的市场趋势。

title: Google Photos uses AI to make the iconic closet from ‘Clueless’ a reality
summary: Google Photos is launching an AI feature that automatically creates a virtual wardrobe from clothing items in your photo library, inspired by the iconic closet from "Clueless." Users can mix and match outfits, save looks, and share them with friends.
content: Google says the new feature will leverage AI technology to automatically create a copy of your wardrobe that's based on the pieces of clothing appearing in your Google Photos library.

zh.title: 谷歌照片应用AI技术将《独家记忆》的标志性衣柜变成现实
zh.summary: 谷歌照片推出AI功能,可自动从你的照片库中的服装项目创建虚拟衣柜,灵感来自《独家记忆》中的标志性衣柜。用户可以混搭服装、保存搭配方案并与朋友分享。

title: More Gemini features are coming to Google TV
summary: Google TV is expanding Gemini integration with new photo and video transformation tools including Nano Banana and Veo. The additions enhance creative capabilities on Google's streaming platform.
content: Google TV just got more Gemini features, including the ability to transform photos and videos with tools Nano Banana and Veo.

zh.title: 更多Gemini功能即将登陆谷歌电视
zh.summary: 谷歌电视正在扩展Gemini集成,新增照片和视频转换工具(包括Nano Banana和Veo)。这些新增功能增强了谷歌流媒体平台的创意能力。

title: Bill Gurley, Jack Altman back startup Pursuit, which helps companies sell to government
summary: Startup Pursuit, which helps companies navigate government procurement, raised $22 million in seed funding led by OpenGov co-founder Mike Rosengarten with backing from prominent VCs including Bill Gurley and Jack Altman. The round signals investor interest in government sales technology.
content: On Wednesday, Pursuit announced a $22 million seed round led by Mike Rosengarten, the co-founder of OpenGov, with big-name VCs participating.

zh.title: Bill Gurley、Jack Altman支持初创公司Pursuit，该公司帮助企业向政府销售产品
zh.summary: 帮助企业解决政府采购问题的初创公司Pursuit获得了由OpenGov联合创始人Mike Rosengarten领导的2200万美元种子融资，得到了包括Bill Gurley和Jack Altman在内的知名风险投资公司的支持。这一融资轮次表明投资者对政府销售技术的兴趣。

title: Nvidia fixes the 8GB RAM problem with one of its GPUs—if you can pay for it
summary: Nvidia has released a 12GB version of its mobile RTX 5070 GPU to address memory limitations of the standard 8GB model, though Framework's implementation charges nearly double for the upgrade. The solution highlights how memory shortages are driving up hardware costs.
content: Framework charges nearly double for the 12GB version of the mobile RTX 5070.

zh.title: 英伟达用其GPU解决8GB内存问题——如果你能承受成本的话
zh.summary: 英伟达推出了移动版RTX 5070 GPU的12GB版本，以解决标准8GB型号的内存限制，但Framework的实现方式对这一升级的收费几乎翻倍。这个解决方案突显了内存短缺如何推高硬件成本。

title: Motorola just revealed the Razr Fold’s price and hoo boy
summary: Motorola's Razr Fold will launch in the US on May 14th at $1,900, making it one of the market's most expensive phones as memory shortage costs surge. The optional Moto Pen Ultra stylus adds another $100 to the price tag.
content:
Gotta hand it to Motorola: it’s a good-looking phone.	

2026 is shaping up to be a tough year to launch a high-end phone. The memory crisis has phone prices rising across the board, so an already expensive phone risks becoming a much too expensive phone. That might be what happened to the Razr Fold, which will cost $1,900 when it goes on sale in the US on May 14th. That doesn't include the Moto Pen Ultra stylus, which costs an additional $100.
Motorola has dripped out some of the Fold's specs since it was first previewed at CES, and those early signs indicated that this device wouldn't be the more affordable folding phone the market so desperately needs. Today's announcement confirms that: it'll …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 摩托罗拉刚刚公开了Razr Fold的价格，天哪
zh.summary: 摩托罗拉的Razr Fold将于5月14日在美国上市，价格为1900美元，在内存短缺成本上升之际，成为市场上最昂贵的手机之一。可选的Moto Pen Ultra触笔额外增加100美元。

title: The new Razr Ultra is still the best-looking phone out there
summary: The 2026 Motorola Razr Ultra maintains its signature design appeal with wood-finish and new Alcantara options while adding a $200 price increase to $1,499. Despite minimal hardware upgrades, the phone continues to stand out in a market where design innovation has stalled.
content:
I mean, c’mon.	

Look, you're not going to find much new on the 2026 version of the Motorola Razr Ultra. There's a new main camera sensor, a slightly bigger battery, and a higher price: $1,499, up from $1,299. But one thing hasn't changed: this is a darn good looking phone.
The wood-finish back panel returns, and is joined by a new suede-like Alcantara option in orient blue. To everyone who has complained to me over the past year that "phones are boring now," which is many-a Verge reader, please look at these phones. They are definitely not boring. They feel nice, they look nice, and they are eminently photographable. 
That's the good ne …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 新款 Razr Ultra 仍是最好看的手机
zh.summary: 2026 年摩托罗拉 Razr Ultra 通过木纹和新的 Alcantara 材质保持标志性设计，价格上调 200 美元至 1,499 美元。尽管硬件升级有限，该手机在设计创新停滞的市场中仍脱颖而出。

title: The Moto Razr and Razr Plus are victims of shrinkflation
summary: The 2026 Razr Plus costs $100 more at $1,099 with minimal substantive upgrades, using a two-year-old Snapdragon 8S Gen 3 processor and offering only a battery capacity increase as its main improvement. The pricing exemplifies shrinkflation affecting Motorola's midtier flip phones.
content:
The Razr Plus only comes in one color, but it’s a good one.	

The memory crisis claims another couple of victims. Motorola's midtier and entry-level flip phones cost $100 more than their predecessors, and have few upgrades to show for it.
The 2026 Razr Plus costs $1,099, up from $999. It still comes with a Snapdragon 8S Gen 3 chipset - two years old at this point - with 12GB of RAM and 256GB of storage. Its silicon-carbon battery offers a 4,500mAh capacity compared to the 4,000mAh capacity on last year's model, which is a significant boost.
But that's its biggest improvement. The main camera hardware is unchanged, but Motorola swapped the previous generation's 50-megapixel 2x telephoto for a 50-megap …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Moto Razr 和 Razr Plus 沦为"缩水涨价"的牺牲品
zh.summary: 2026 年 Razr Plus 价格提高 100 美元至 1,099 美元，升级幅度极小，采用两年前的 Snapdragon 8S Gen 3 处理器，主要改进仅是电池容量增加。这一定价体现了摩托罗拉中端折叠屏手机面临的缩水涨价现象。

title: Google Photos launches an AI try-on feature for clothes you already have
summary: Google Photos is launching an AI try-on feature that creates a virtual wardrobe from clothing items in your photo library, enabling users to mix and match outfits from pieces they already own. The tool lets users browse captured outfits, create new combinations, and share looks with friends.
content:
Google Photos is launching a new AI-powered feature you can use to virtually try on clothes you already have. Using the photos in your gallery, Google will create a virtual "wardrobe," allowing you to mix and match outfits, save the looks you like, and share them with friends.
A video shared by Google shows how Photos organizes your outfits and individual pieces of clothing into a virtual "wardrobe." You can browse through the outfits you were captured wearing, as well as create new ones by choosing from tops, bottoms, skirts, dresses, and shoes to put together a new look.
You can also select the button in the bottom right corner of each o …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Google Photos 推出衣柜虚拟试衣 AI 功能
zh.summary: Google Photos 推出一项 AI 虚拟试衣功能，可从用户照片库中提取衣物，创建虚拟衣柜，让用户混搭自己拥有的衣服。该工具使用户可以浏览已捕捉的搭配、创建新组合并与朋友分享。

title: Google Translate now lets you practice pronunciation
summary: Google Translate has launched a pronunciation practice feature available in the U.S. and India, initially supporting English, Spanish, and Hindi. This feature helps language learners improve their speaking skills directly within the translation tool. The rollout represents an expansion of Translate's functionality beyond text translation.
content: The feature is rolling out in the U.S. and India with support for English, Spanish, and Hindi.

zh.title: Google 翻译现在让您可以练习发音
zh.summary: Google 翻译推出了在美国和印度可用的发音练习功能，最初支持英语、西班牙语和印地语。此功能帮助语言学习者直接在翻译工具中改进他们的口语技能。此次推出代表了翻译功能从文本翻译的扩展。

title: School-shooting lawsuits accuse OpenAI of hiding violent ChatGPT users
summary: Lawsuits allege that OpenAI failed to report a ChatGPT user engaged in violent behavior to law enforcement, allegedly to protect CEO Sam Altman and the company's IPO prospects. The claims raise questions about OpenAI's responsibility in monitoring and reporting dangerous user activity. This highlights potential tensions between platform safety and business interests.
content: Lawsuits: OpenAI didn't report ChatGPT user to cops to protect Altman, IPO.

zh.title: 校园枪击案诉讼指控 OpenAI 隐瞒暴力 ChatGPT 用户
zh.summary: 诉讼指控 OpenAI 未能将从事暴力行为的 ChatGPT 用户报告给执法部门，据称是为了保护首席执行官 Sam Altman 和公司的上市前景。这些主张引发了人们对 OpenAI 在监控和报告危险用户活动方面责任的质疑。这突显了平台安全与商业利益之间的潜在紧张关系。

title: Jack Dorsey-backed Vine reboot Divine launches to the public
summary: Divine, a Vine reboot backed by Jack Dorsey's nonprofit, has launched publicly and reintroduces the short-form looping video format that made Vine popular before its 2017 shutdown. The platform aims to recapture the creative energy of the original service. This represents a significant attempt to revive a beloved but defunct social media platform.
content: Divine, a Vine reboot backed by Jack Dorsey’s nonprofit, revives six-second looping videos.

zh.title: Jack Dorsey 支持的 Vine 改版 Divine 向公众推出
zh.summary: Divine 是一个由 Jack Dorsey 非营利组织支持的 Vine 改版，已公开推出，重新推出了在 Vine 2017 年关闭之前使其流行的短视频循环格式。该平台旨在重新获得原始服务的创意活力。这代表了复兴一个深受喜爱但已停用的社交媒体平台的重大尝试。

title: Electric air taxis are finally taking flight — just not with passengers
summary: Joby Aviation successfully completed a historic 14-minute uncrewed demonstration flight of its electric air taxi from JFK Airport to a Manhattan helipad, showcasing the aircraft's viability for future commercial service. The egg-shaped aircraft with six tilt-rotor propellers demonstrated key technology for urban air mobility. This milestone represents significant progress toward commercially viable electric air transportation.
content:
Joby’s electric air taxi at the Lower Manhattan helipad, April 28th, 2026. | Photo: Owen Grove / The Verge	

It was the perfect day for an electric air taxi demonstration - albeit one without passengers. 
On Monday, an electric aircraft from Joby Aviation took off from JFK Airport for a flight demonstrating the company's future air taxi route to Manhattan. The aircraft - egg-shaped cabin, six tilt-rotor propellers, electric motor - made its way west along the Brooklyn shore before turning north toward the city. Approximately 14 minutes after takeoff, it touched down at the heliport at West 30th Street, completing its historic journey.
You could tell it was a momentous occasion based on the number of references the assembled officials made to the  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 电动空中出租车终于起飞了——只是还没有乘客
zh.summary: Joby Aviation公司成功完成了其电动空中出租车从肯尼迪机场到曼哈顿直升机停机坪的历史性14分钟无人驾驶示范飞行,展示了该飞行器用于未来商业服务的可行性。这款蛋形飞行器配备六个可倾斜螺旋桨,展示了城市空中交通的关键技术。这一里程碑代表了朝向商业可行的电动空中运输迈出的重大进步。

title: Saros reminded me how great the DualSense can be
summary: The game Saros demonstrates the DualSense controller's advanced haptic feedback capabilities, which remain largely underutilized since the PS5's launch despite early examples like Astro's Playroom. Few recent games have fully leveraged the controller's haptic and adaptive trigger technology. Saros serves as a reminder of what's possible when developers maximize the controller's immersive potential.
content:
The DualSense controller was one of Sony's main selling points for the PS5. Beyond things like a striking new design and adaptive triggers, the controller's haptic feedback offered genuinely cool new experiences for games. Rumble effects had been around for decades at that point, but the DualSense offered something very different: I'm still blown away by the sand crunching under Astro's feet in Team Asobi's Astro's Playroom or the futuristic pulses from weapons in Housemarque's Returnal.
But there have been few titles since the PS5's release that have captured that same magic and showed off what made the controller so distinct. This week, H …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《Saros》让我想起DualSense手柄有多强大
zh.summary: 游戏《Saros》展示了DualSense手柄先进的触觉反馈功能,尽管PS5推出后有《Astro's Playroom》等早期例子,但这些功能在很大程度上仍未被充分利用。很少有最近的游戏充分利用手柄的触觉和自适应扳机技术。《Saros》提醒我们,当开发者最大化手柄的沉浸式潜力时会有什么可能。

title: Your PS5 can now transform into a Linux PC
summary: Developer Andy Nguyen has published a method to run Linux on certain PS5 models, enabling users to play PC games on the console with enhanced performance in high frame rates and resolutions. The soft mod requires Linux installation to be redone after each restart but has demonstrated games like GTA V and Spider-Man running at 60fps. This represents a creative workaround that expands the PS5's versatility beyond Sony's official software.
content:
A developer has created a method to get Linux running on some versions of Sony's PlayStation 5 console. Andy Nguyen previously showed off a ported version of Ubuntu running PC games on a PS5 last month, and he's now published the installation steps on GitHub this week.
This is a soft mod, so it won't persist between power downs or restarts, but the Linux installation will let you play PC games once it's up and running. So far we've seen GTA V running with enhanced ray tracing at 60fps in Ubuntu on a PS5, as well as Spider-Man running at 1440p resolution and 60fps.
Nguyen is relying on a patched vulnerability to transform a PS5 into a Linux …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 你的PS5现在可以变成Linux PC了
zh.summary: 开发者Andy Nguyen公开了一种在特定PS5型号上运行Linux的方法,让用户能够在主机上以高帧率和分辨率运行PC游戏。这个软修改需要在每次重启后重新安装Linux,但已经演示了《GTA V》和《蜘蛛侠》以60fps运行。这代表了一个创意的变通方案,扩展了PS5在索尼官方软件之外的多功能性。

title: Check your gravity with NASA's Artemis II zero-g indicator
summary: NASA is offering an Artemis II zero-g indicator merchandise item through its official NASA exchange store to commemorate the upcoming crewed Moon mission. The product allows space enthusiasts to connect with NASA's exploration programs. This represents merchandise supporting one of the space agency's flagship initiatives.
content: On sale through the NASA exchange.

zh.title: 用NASA的阿尔忒弥斯II零重力指示器检查你的重力
zh.summary: NASA通过其官方NASA商城提供阿尔忒弥斯II零重力指示器商品，以纪念即将进行的载人月球任务。该产品让太空爱好者能够与NASA的探索计划建立联系。这代表了支持该航天机构旗舰计划的商品。

title: Why a recent supply-chain attack singled out security firms Checkmarx and Bitwarden
summary: A recent supply-chain attack specifically targeted security firms including Checkmarx and Bitwarden, exposing vulnerabilities in the security software industry itself. The incident highlights how companies providing security solutions face unique risks from sophisticated attackers. This underscores the challenges security firms face in protecting themselves and their customers from advanced threats.
content: Security firms find themselves especially exposed.

zh.title: 为什么最近的供应链攻击特意针对安全公司Checkmarx和Bitwarden
zh.summary: 最近的供应链攻击特别针对Checkmarx和Bitwarden等安全公司，暴露了安全软件行业本身的漏洞。该事件突显了提供安全解决方案的公司面临来自复杂攻击者的独特风险。这强调了安全公司在保护自己和客户免受高级威胁方面面临的挑战。

title: Meta isn’t doing enough to keep kids off Facebook and Instagram, rules EU
summary: The European Commission has ruled that Meta is breaching the Digital Services Act by failing to adequately prevent children under 13 from accessing Facebook and Instagram, with inadequate measures to identify and remove minors already on the platforms. Meta faces potential fines of up to $12 billion if it doesn't remedy these compliance failures. The ruling highlights ongoing regulatory pressure on major tech platforms to enforce age restrictions and protect minors online.
content:
Meta could face fines of up to $12 billion if it doesn’t remedy the DSA breaches. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images	

Meta is breaching Europe's Digital Services Act (DSA) rules by failing to prevent children under 13 from using Facebook and Instagram, according to a preliminary decision issued by the European Commission.
The Commission announced the ruling on Wednesday after an almost two-year investigation,  saying that Meta doesn't have adequate measures in place to stop under-13s from accessing its services, or to identify and remove those already on its social media platforms. A notable example is that minors can simply enter a false birth date when signing up for Facebook and Instagram to falsely declare they're over 13 years old - the minimum age ou …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 欧盟裁定Meta在防止儿童使用Facebook和Instagram方面做得不够
zh.summary: 欧洲委员会裁定Meta通过未能充分防止13岁以下儿童访问Facebook和Instagram而违反了《数字服务法》，并采取了不足的措施来识别和移除平台上已有的未成年人。如果Meta不解决这些合规问题，将面临高达120亿美元的潜在罚款。该裁定突显了主要科技平台在执行年龄限制和保护在线未成年人方面面临的持续监管压力。

title: China freezes new robotaxi licenses after Baidu chaos
summary: China has suspended the issuance of new licenses for autonomous vehicles following a chaotic incident where dozens of Baidu robotaxis ground to a halt in Wuhan, creating traffic disruptions. The restrictions prevent companies from expanding their driverless car fleets or launching new projects, pending a sector-wide review by local governments. The freeze reflects regulators' concerns about the safety and reliability of autonomous vehicle systems.
content:
A Baidu Apollo Go robotaxi in Wuhan, China. | Image: Bloomberg via Getty Images	

China has suspended new licenses for autonomous vehicles, Bloomberg reports, citing unnamed people familiar with the matter. The move comes after dozens of robotaxis operated by Chinese tech giant Baidu ground to a halt in traffic last month in Wuhan, creating chaos. 
The restrictions will prevent companies from adding new driverless cars to their fleets, expanding into new cities, or starting new test projects. It is unclear when officials will start issuing new licenses again.
Bloomberg said the Wuhan incident alarmed authorities in Beijing, prompting regulators to urge local governments to review the sector to prevent similar episodes.  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 中国在百度事件后冻结新的机器人出租车许可证
zh.summary: 中国暂停了自动驾驶汽车新许可证的发放，原因是武汉百度机器人出租车发生混乱事件。这反映了监管机构对自动驾驶系统安全和可靠性的担忧。

title: GitHub rushed to fix a critical vulnerability in less than six hours
summary: GitHub's security team identified and patched a critical remote code execution vulnerability in less than six hours after Wiz Research discovered it, preventing potential unauthorized access to millions of public and private code repositories. The vulnerability was in GitHub's internal git infrastructure and posed an immediate threat to the platform's security. This rapid response demonstrates GitHub's commitment to security incident management and the value of responsible vulnerability disclosure.
content:
GitHub employees fixed a critical remote code execution vulnerability in less than six hours last month. Wiz Research used AI models to uncover a vulnerability in GitHub's internal git infrastructure that could have allowed attackers to access millions of public and private code repositories.
"Our security team immediately began validating the bug bounty report. Within 40 minutes, we had reproduced the vulnerability internally and confirmed the severity," explains Alexis Wales, GitHub chief information security officer. "This was a critical issue that required immediate action."
GitHub's engineering team developed a fix and deployed it jus …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: GitHub在六小时内修复严重漏洞
zh.summary: GitHub安全团队在Wiz Research发现后不到六小时内识别并修补了一个严重的远程代码执行漏洞。这展示了GitHub对安全事件管理的承诺和负责任漏洞披露的价值。

title: Coby Adcock’s Scout AI raises $100M to train its models for war. We visited its bootcamp
summary: Scout AI, backed by investor Coby Adcock, has raised $100 million to develop AI agents that assist individual soldiers in controlling autonomous vehicle fleets. The company operates a training bootcamp focused on military applications of AI technology. This investment reflects growing interest in AI-powered autonomous systems for defense and military operations.
content: We visited Scout AI's training ground where it's working on AI agents that can help individual soldiers control fleets of autonomous vehicles.

zh.title: Scout AI获得1亿美元融资用于军事自动驾驶
zh.summary: 由投资者Coby Adcock支持的Scout AI获得1亿美元融资，用于开发AI代理帮助士兵控制自动驾驶车队。这投资反映了人们对军事AI应用日益增长的兴趣。

title: General Motors is adding Gemini to four million cars
summary: General Motors is deploying Google's Gemini AI assistant to approximately four million vehicles across Cadillac, Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC model year 2022 and newer, representing one of the largest automotive deployments of Gemini. The upgrade will be delivered via over-the-air software updates over several months, replacing the current Google Assistant. This deployment demonstrates how major automakers are integrating advanced AI capabilities into consumer vehicles.
content:
Gemini is coming to Cadillac, Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC vehicles. | Image: General Motors	

General Motors is planning to bring Google's Gemini AI assistant to around four million vehicles across the US. Model year 2022 and newer Cadillac, Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC vehicles with Google built-in will be eligible for the AI upgrade, which will be rolled out via over-the-air software updates for GM's infotainment system "over several months," according to GM's announcement.
GM says this update represents "one of the largest deployments of Gemini in the industry," and that "customers will notice an upgrade from the current Google Assistant to a smarter, more intuitive AI assistant that continues to improve over time." 
The assistant  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 通用汽车为四百万辆汽车添加Gemini
zh.summary: 通用汽车正在向凯迪拉克、雪佛兰、别克和GMC等品牌的约四百万辆2022年及以后车型部署谷歌的Gemini AI助手，代表了Gemini最大的汽车应用之一。升级将通过空中软件更新在几个月内完成，替代当前的谷歌助手。此举展示了主要汽车制造商如何将先进的AI能力集成到消费车辆中。

title: How one venture firm is investing in an increasingly fragmented world
summary: Geopolitical turmoil has significantly disrupted traditional venture capital strategies. Kompas VC is addressing this challenge by focusing its investments on startups building physical-world solutions, carving out a niche in this fragmented investment landscape.
content: Geopolitical turmoil has made venture investing challenging, leading Kompas VC to carve out a niche in startups focused on the physical world.

zh.title: 一家风险投资公司如何在日益分裂的世界中进行投资
zh.summary: 地缘政治动荡严重打乱了传统风险投资策略。Kompas风险投资公司通过聚焦于建设物理世界解决方案的初创企业来应对这一挑战，在这个分裂的投资格局中开辟了自己的利基市场。

title: At his OpenAI trial, Musk relitigates an old friendship
summary: Musk testified about a story of an old friendship he has previously told in interviews and biography, marking the first time he said it under oath in the OpenAI trial.
content: It's a story Musk has told before -- in interviews and to author Walter Isaacson for his bestselling biography of Musk -- but Tuesday was the first time he said it under oath.

zh.title: 在OpenAI诉讼中，穆斯克重新诉说一段旧友谊
zh.summary: 穆斯克在法庭上作证讲述了他之前在采访和传记中讲过的一个旧友谊故事，这是他在OpenAI诉讼中首次在宣誓下作出此陈述。
